name: Freedom Desire, Stability Behavior
description: The user says they want freedom, but repeated behavior or context keeps selecting stability and delay.
risk: Freedom may remain an identity fantasy unless it is converted into observable action.

name: Recognition Denied, Recognition Pursued
description: The user appears driven by recognition while also rejecting or distrusting recognition once received.
risk: No amount of outside validation fully resolves the inner proof loop.

name: Intimacy Desire, Withdrawal Under Pressure
description: The user wants relationships where they do not perform, but pressure still triggers withdrawal or concealment.
risk: The relationship branch may repeat unless truth appears earlier than retreat.

name: Clear Analysis, Weak Action
description: The user can model the problem internally but does not reliably convert insight into external action.
risk: Prediction should weight behavior history more than insight quality.

name: Meaning Need, Cashflow Lock
description: The user seeks a more meaningful path while the current cashflow structure keeps the old identity useful.
risk: Future prediction should account for staged transition constraints.
